Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Mar-03-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Milton Katz for Petitioner, Maria Barrera, via Court Call.

Mr. Katz stated he overlooked the matter with no valid excuse, that it has been filed and courtesy copies are being delivered today.

The petition to terminate for lack of assets is continued to March 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-19-2020 Continued To Nov-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Real Property (P.C. 850)
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for Petitioner.
James Millar for Objector.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to whether or not the Probate Court has jurisdiction under Probate Code 850 to decide this matter, or whether it should be heard in the Civil Court. The Petition to Determine Ownership of Real Property is under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Real Property (P.C. 850)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Continued To Jun-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for Maria Magdalena Barrera (Petitioner).
James Millar for Maria Barrera (Objector).

Counsel reported that mediation was unsuccessful. Mr. Katz suggested setting the matter for an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Millar stated that a massive amount of discovery will be needed. The Court stated that the property is not under the jurisdiction of this Court (Probate), that the property was in joint tenancy with the Sister, that she gets the property, that it has not passed through this estate and that this should be in Civil Court. Mr. Katz stated that he would like to see what his procedures are before he gives up jurisdiction in this Court. The Petition to Determine Ownership of Real Property is continued to June 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Real Property (P.C. 850)
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Continued To Jun-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for Maria Magdalena Barrera.
James Millar for Maria Barrera.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than May 28, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by May 29, 2019. The Petition to Determine Ownership of Real Property is continued to and the Parties are to return on June 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Real Property (P.C. 850)
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Continued To May-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Millar for Maria Barrera.

Mr. Millar stated that he has not heard from Mr. Katz, that he can't offer anything to the Court and that they only agreed in theory to go to pro bono mediation. Mr. Millar stepped out of the courtroom and placed a call to Mr. Katz, but there was no answer. The Court stated that it can not order the matter to mediation if one of the parties is not present. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Milton Katz to appear on May 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear to address the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition to Determine Ownership of Real Property, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for Petitioner.
James Millar for Maria Barrera (Objector).

The Court noted that the petition was primarily for the purpose of addressing issues concerning the real property, that it now it has information that there is personal property that needs to be marshalled and asked the parties where they are in the case. Mr. Katz stated that he believes they will agree to mediation in the 850 petition, but not this petition. Mr. Millar stated that he has objections with regard to the real property, but no objection with regard to the pension, and that he has no objection to the petitioner being appointed with limited authority. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with limited authority (subject to review and modification of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for October 19, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Real Property (P.C. 850)
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Continued To Apr-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for Petitioner.
James Millar for and with Maria Barrera (Objector).

The Court informed Mr. Katz that the petition was signed, but not verified. The Court also questions if the children were noticed and stated that if the petitioner recovers the property as community property it will go to her, not into the estate and therefore this is not an 850 petition. Mr. Katz stated that the children were not noticed, asked for an opportunity to do some research on the issue and stated that he filed a supplement to the petition for letters of administration with respect to the retirement account. The Petition to Determine Ownership of Real Property is continued to April 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Katz is to clear up the procedural issues.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Continued To Mar-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Real Property (P.C. 850)

Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Continued To Feb-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Ownership Of Real Property (P.C. 850)
Off Calendar Dec-26-2018 Continued To Feb-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Continued To Jan-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Continued To Oct-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for Petitioner.
James Millar for Maria Barrera (Objector).

The Court stated that the issue is whether there is anything here to probate if the property passes in joint tenancy, that is has not seen any deeds and that the objection is based solely on who is entitled to receive the property. Mr. Millar stated that bond should be required and raised the issue of the domicile place of residency being listed in San Francisco when the Decedent was deported to Mexico five to ten years ago. Mr. Katz stated that there is no evidence that the Decedent was deported, that it is his understanding that the Decedent and his Family went to Mexico for an extended period of time, and that he has no knowledge of him being deported. Mr. Millar stated that they have a deed reflecting that the property is held in the names of the Decedent and the Sister. Mr. Katz stated that the Wife deeded the property over at the insistence of the Husband breaching his fiduciary duty. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that an 850 Petition needs to be filed and that it expects evidence to address domicile to be submitted.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
